generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of an insulated box fitted with a heatbed, designed for precise temperature control in laboratory environments. Key characteristics include thermal regulation requirements, sensor-based monitoring for stability, and the need for predictive simulation to maintain optimal conditions."
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for real-time temperature monitoring in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from Physical Twin sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, MonitoringSystem
]

instance ThermalBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using differential equations for dynamic thermal analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicModelingEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter estimation and model updating"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring system for safety and performance checks"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic component for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for system operation management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for system state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer for enhancing system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance DynamicModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic modeling techniques using differential equations for thermal analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulation using CAD and behavioral models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance ThermalIncubatorCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the thermal incubator system using CAD models for physical dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model integrating cyber and physical aspects of the system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizationEnabler
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for analytical model processing in optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and optimal performance assessment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitorInsight, PerformanceInsight, FaultDetectionInsight, StateEstimationInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation capabilities for forecasting Physical Twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for enhancing system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control service for initiating corrective actions upon violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedCorrectiveAction, ManualCorrectiveAction
]

instance SafetyMonitorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitors safety conditions and triggers decision-making processes"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assesses operational efficiency of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
]

instance EfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for system performance enhancement"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimates system states based on sensor data and models"
]

instance AutomatedCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated corrective actions initiated by algorithms upon detecting violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective actions initiated by human operators upon detecting violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin are initiated by humans or algorithms upon detecting violations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update CPS and environment models with best parameter estimates; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria, detecting violations to trigger corrective actions."
]
